_comment: Self-contained GitHub daemon profile. Select with `CodeReviewDaemon --review achieveai`. Reviews achieveai/LmDotnetTools through the achieveai/AchieveAiReviews cross-repo store (tool-assisted, sub-agents). Two-model split: the dispatcher/state orchestrator loop runs ReviewModelId (gpt-5.6-luna); the code-reviewer:* review sub-agents run SubAgentModelId (gpt-5.6-sol). SAFETY: EnableCommentPosting is omitted ⇒ false ⇒ collect-only, so nothing is posted. The DEPLOYED daemon (crd-daemon-revobot) posts live and shares port 5080 + the review-pool — do NOT run this alongside it, and only set EnableCommentPosting:true when this profile REPLACES it. Machine-specific absolute paths below; this is a fresh instance (its own .run DB) — point DatabasePath at crd-daemon-revobot/review-opus.db to continue that daemon's history.
